# Phase 14: Core SEO Foundation Verification Report

**Phase Goal:** Every page generated by Genorah has correct, complete SEO metadata -- framework-native, no deprecated libraries, honest about SPA limitations
**Verified:** 2026-02-25
**Status:** passed
**Re-verification:** No -- initial verification

## Goal Achievement

### Observable Truths

| # | Truth | Status | Evidence |
|---|-------|--------|----------|
| 1 | Rewritten seo-meta skill (Core tier) provides complete per-page metadata patterns for Next.js 16, Astro 5/6, and React 19 using only framework-native APIs | VERIFIED | skills/seo-meta/SKILL.md line 4: tier core, version 3.0.0. Layer 2 has 20 code blocks. Zero deprecated library recommendations. All Next.js patterns use Promise params with await. |
| 2 | Canonical URL generation is always dynamic with mandatory metadataBase, trailing slash consistency, and cross-domain handling | VERIFIED | Layer 2 Section B: 7 hard rules, metadataBase + relative canonical, Astro.url.href, pagination, cross-domain. metadataBase appears 15 times. HARD constraint line 922. Anti-pattern at line 868. |
| 3 | XML sitemap and sitemap index generation patterns produce valid output for GSC and Bing | VERIFIED | Layer 2 Section C: sitemap.ts, generateSitemaps with async id, @astrojs/sitemap, validation checklist with 10 GSC rules. Constraints for max entries and canonical match. |
| 4 | robots.txt includes sitemap reference, crawl directives, and complete AI crawler taxonomy | VERIFIED | Layer 2 Section D: Next.js robots.ts, Astro static, React/Vite static. appendix-ai-bots.md: 28 bots in 4 categories with per-bot rationale. Quarterly review protocol. HARD constraint line 928. |
| 5 | Framework capability matrix honestly discloses SPA limitations and guides toward SSR | VERIFIED | Layer 1 matrix: 11 rows, 4 frameworks. React/Vite: Limited readiness, empty shell, broken social preview. Honest guidance at line 48. React 19 pattern has 5 limitation warnings. |

**Score:** 5/5 truths verified
